transcript.text:
[Dimsum Mukbang]
[Just how many is she eating...?]
[It never ends...]
[Still not enough...]
[More! More!]
[Holy...]
Do you get a lot of money if you eat this much?
[How many did she eat?]
[Rainy season in July]
Hello everyone
I'm at Yongsan to eat some dimsum (Chinese dumplings)
I wanted some steamy dimsum for a rainy day like this
The owner of this place has been making dimsum for over 50 years and the restaurant is over 20 years old
[Western China located in Hannam-dong]
I'm getting nervous already thinking about the juicy dumplings
Let's go eat

[Let's sit]
Tzuyang unni is here, look!
[The worker is a fan of Tzuyang!}
She's pretty and she's good at eating
I think she'll eat over 200,000 Won worth of food here
That's nonsense
She can do it Sounds about right
I don't like it if you eat too much Just enjoy the food and don't leave leftovers
She won't leave any leftovers It's her mukbang
-So many different types of dimsum -Right? There's a lot
Well then,
I'll take 1 of each
But 3 orders of Xiao Long Bao, 2 orders of Shrimp Shumai
2 orders of Shrimp Har Gow,
One of each eggrolls,
One of each tempuras,

So including the tempuras, it's 18 orders
[The order list...]
[It's here!]
[How will you eat all of that?]
I love dimsum The juicy fillings
I have to start with Xiao Long Bao It's the best when it's fresh and hot
Oh no, I popped it
Already?
It spilled out
Get it like this
If you pop this, the meat juice comes out
Just like that
So good
That's really good
I had some dimsum recently at a famous place And this tastes better
The meat juice has really deep flavors

So thick that it's almost sticky
It's really juicy
Even if I spilled some
Rip a little like this
Look at all that
She's going to eat all of that by herself
This is our boss (the owner)
Dimsum with 50 years of tradition
Just dimsum for 50 years? It's so good
Enjoy your meal
How many people are eating all of this?
It's all for her
She's eating that by herself
[No way]
[In disbelief] She can't
Shrimp Har Gow

Looks good Very cute too. Looks like a clam
Amazing Take a look at this
It's filled with shrimp
This has got to be the best dimsum I've had recently
So delicious
What's this?
Shrimp Shumai
It has shrimp on top... And it's... going through... filled...
I'm not sure
Everything tastes yummy
This one feels different
This one has whole-shrimp meats inside
While this has a variety of meat in the fillings
Just like this
I can taste some squid too
This one looks like beef eggrolls

Right? It's beef
I thought it'd be like ground beef, but the pieces are pretty big
This is the vegetable eggrolls
It's filled with cheese!
More cheese than veggies
Tastes good
Deepfried Shrimp Meatball
Looks like it's wrapped with noodles
Delicious
The outside is so crispy Almost like a chip
This tastes good
I've been wanting to try this one I'm not sure what to expect
Fried Sea Cucumber Very unusual, right?
This tastes very familiar
The texture is very similar to shrimp
I love the consistency of it

Next
Spicy Scallop with XO sauce
Spicy scallop
This feels like mandu (Korean dumplings)
[I love it]
Minced Beef Shumai I'm speaking fast now
Beef Shumai
That's good
Chive Dimsum
I love the clear layer It's really chewy
Delicious
Strong chive flavors
And it's gelatinous All of them
What's this? Spicy Shrimp Pork Rolls
It looks good
That's spicy

But very tasty
It's like spicy whole-shrimp dumplings
Another one of these before it gets cold
Oh no I keep popping it, letting the juice out
I like eating the whole thing and popping the juice
Insane
[The Dimsum Tower is 7 floors high now]
-Did you eat all of that? -Yes
Shrimp vegetable dimsum
Dip
It's raining a lot
Pretty crazy out there
[It's crazier in here...]
[Inaudible]
[Meatball on top of sea cucumber]
Black Cod Shumai here

Cod meat
Soft and chewy
Deepfried Spicy Shrimp & Pork
This is the deepfried version of the rolls I had earlier
Shrimp dimsum
Shrimp Shumai
This also has a lot of shrimp meat
This doesn't seem enough
Should I order more?
This one was good too (Shrimp Vegetable Dimsum)
It has whole-shrimp inside
I thought this would be filled with veggies, but it's filled with cheese
It tastes even better
This is really good too
Very savory
I want to see the inside Let's see

Blended
How about the cod one?
Of course Cod meat
I think this is so tasty
[Inaudible]
I prefer the Cod Shumai over the Shrimp Shumai
Wait, do I like the shrimp one more?
I think I like the Shrimp Shumai more
Can I order more?
1 Shrimp Shumai,
1 Shrimp Har Gow, 1 Shrimp Vegetable Dimsum,
1 Black Cod Shumai, and 3 orders of Xiao Long Bao
3 orders?!
[I shouldn't have worried about leftovers]
It's so juicy that it spilled like this on the way
Get it on the spoon like this

Thank you
[2nd Round]
When they're hot and fresh
Check this out
Don't explode Please!
Please no! It already popped
This one didn't pop
Just like that in the mouth
[Hot!]
I burned my mouth
[Success]
So good
Shrimp~
Completely filled with meaty shrimp
Shrimp Shumai
Vegetable dimsum

I have to balance them out
[Is that okay...?]
Put them all together?
It pops easier after it gets cold
I guess not
Tastes so good
I want more
It's like stacking up sushi plates
Last Xiao Long Bao
[25 stacks!]
[Here comes the photos]
You eat so much but you're so skinny
Where does it all go?
Wait...
-Is that Tzuyang? -Yes
[Oh my]

[She didn't recognized her because of the hair]
I didn't realize!
[What happened here?]
-You ate all of this? -Yes
[It's like there's a wall between us...]
3 cans of coke too?
50 years on dimsum
This has never happend before
Do you get paid a lot for eating this much?
[I just don't understand...]
Thank you for the meal It was the best
How can she eat 25 orders?
First time in 50 years
Thanks everyone [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
